3221450.name: Snapshot!
3221450.description:
STORY

This game is a work of satire. It offers a dark-humored take on the phenomenon of tosatsu (盗撮) in Japan: The illegal act of taking secret upskirt photos. This game does not endorse or promote this behavior in real life.

You play in a 3D sandbox RPG set in the outskirts of Tokyo, where you're armed with a camera, poor judgment, and questionable morals. Take secret photos to earn cash and upgrade your gear. Panty shots are not enough?  Interact with the locals and unlock all their secrets!

FEATURES

  • Roam around in an outskirt of Tokyo taking secret upskirt pictures for profit.

  • Upgrade your camera with fancy lenses to zoom in on your terrible decisions.

  • Talk to the locals.

  • Date the locals! (They should probably know better.)

  • Dodge the police!

  • Make awful, life-defining choices. (Just like in real life!)

OTHER THINGS TO DO

  • Take adorable pussy photos. (Fluffy cats. Duh.)

  • Find secret spots to photograph more things.

  • Walk for miles. (Don't say I didn't warn you.)

  • Reflect deeply on the downsides of modern Japanese society.

  • Make it worse.
3221450.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
